title: isocoma humilis
intro: Isocoma humilis, also known as White Sage or Bear's Paw, is a perennial shrub native to North America, belonging to the Asteraceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Isocoma humilis include treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, as well as providing relief from fever and sore throats. Herbal preparations of Isocoma humilis can be made into teas, infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
